title: Grilled Minari Skewers with Garlic Marinade
description: A delicious and easy-to-make Korean-inspired dish featuring minari, marinated in a garlicky mixture and grilled to perfection.
instructions: Cut the minari into 2-inch pieces and place in a bowl.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, and olive oil.
Pour the marinade over the minari and toss to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated minari onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the minari is slightly charred and tender.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
